001package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service;
002
003import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.AcceptedStateNotFoundException;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.ConflictException;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.exception.DuplicateAcceptedStateException;
006import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.model.entity.AcceptedState;
007import edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository.AcceptedStateRepository;
008import java.util.List;
009import org.springframework.beans.factory.annotation.Autowired;
010import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort;
011import org.springframework.data.domain.Sort.Direction;
012import org.springframework.stereotype.Service;
013
014/**
015 * Default {@link AcceptedStateService} implementation backed by {@link AcceptedStateRepository}.
016 */
017@Service
018public class AcceptedStateServiceImpl implements AcceptedStateService {
019
020  private final AcceptedStateRepository repository;
021
022  /**
023   * Creates a service using the provided repository.
024   *
025   * @param repository accepted state repository.
026   */
027  @Autowired
028  public AcceptedStateServiceImpl(AcceptedStateRepository repository) {
029    this.repository = repository;
030  }
031
032  @Override
033  public List<AcceptedState> getAll() {
034    return repository.findAll(Sort.by(Direction.ASC, "statusTag"));
035  }
036
037  @Override
038  public AcceptedState getByStatusTag(String statusTag) {
039    AcceptedState state = repository.findByStatusTag(statusTag);
040    if (state == null) {
041      throw new AcceptedStateNotFoundException("Accepted state status tag not found: " + statusTag);
042    }
043    return state;
044  }
045
046  @Override
047  public AcceptedState createNewAcceptedState(AcceptedState newAcceptedState) {
048    if (repository.existsByStatusTag(newAcceptedState.getStatusTag())) {
049      throw new DuplicateAcceptedStateException("Accepted state status tag already exists: "
050          + newAcceptedState.getStatusTag());
051    }
052    return repository.save(newAcceptedState);
053  }
054
055  @Override
056  public AcceptedState updateAcceptedStateDescription(String statusTag, String newDescription) {
057    AcceptedState stateToChange = repository.findByStatusTag(statusTag);
058    if (stateToChange == null) {
059      throw new AcceptedStateNotFoundException("Accepted state status tag not found: " + statusTag);
060    }
061    stateToChange.setStatusTagDescription(newDescription);
062    return repository.save(stateToChange);
063  }
064
065  @Override
066  public void deleteUnusedAcceptedState(String statusTag) {
067    AcceptedState doomedState = repository.findByStatusTag(statusTag);
068    if (doomedState == null) {
069      throw new AcceptedStateNotFoundException("Accepted state status tag not found: " + statusTag);
070    }
071    if (doomedState.getIssueReports().isEmpty()) {
072      repository.delete(doomedState);
073    } else {
074      throw new ConflictException("Cannot delete accepted state with active reports");
075    }
076  }
077
078}
079
